items.title: Is SpaceX's $25B debt sale raising bubble concerns on Wall Street?
items.summary: SpaceX (SPCX) stock continues to struggle to gain back some ground after shedding nearly all of its post-IPO gains. The Elon Musk-led company's $25 billion bond sale is now raising concerns on Wall Street about a possible market bubble, according to the Financial Times. Morning Brief Host Julie Hyman is joined by Yahoo Finance Tech Editor Dan Howley and Epistrophy Capital Research chief market strategist Cory Johnson to weigh in on all of this.

items.title: May PCE: Inflation ticks up to highest level since 2023
items.summary: May's Personal Consumption Expenditures (PCE) index — the Federal Reserve's preferred inflation gauge — saw inflation rise 0.4% month-over-month and 4.1% year-over-year Core PCE, which excludes food and energy prices, rose 0.3% monthly and 3.4% annually, marking the highest level since 2023. Morning Brief Host Julie Hyman is joined by Yahoo Finance Tech Editor Dan Howley and Epistrophy Capital Research chief market strategist Cory Johnson to further examine rising price trends.
